stories.title: The rippling effect of the Iran war, seen from the border with Turkey
stories.description: U.S. marines have arrived in the Middle East. NPR's Emily Feng has been monitoring the latest developments from the border of Iran and Turkey.

stories.title: Iran warns U.S. against ground invasion, as Pakistan holds diplomatic talks
stories.description: A high-ranking Iranian official has accused the U.S. of planning a ground invasion as part of the next stage in the Iran war, and said such an intervention would be met with force.

stories.title: Yemen's Houthi rebels enter the fighting in the Middle East
stories.description: At least 15 U.S. military personnel were wounded in an Iranian attack on Saudi Arabia and Yemen's Houthi rebels entered the war with an attack on Israel.

stories.title: Over a dozen U.S. soldiers injured in attack on Saudi base as Iran-backed Houthis enter war
stories.description: An Iranian strike on an air base in Saudi Arabia wounded at least 15 U.S. service members. Israel also said it intercepted a missile launched from Iran-backed Houthi rebels in Yemen.

stories.title: Iran-backed Houthis join war with attack against Israel
stories.description: There are fears the Iranian proxy may attack shipping in the Red Sea, adding to global economic woes.

stories.title: Potential Houthi threat to Red Sea shipping could further damage global economy
stories.description: The Iran-backed group could bring a second crucial waterway to a standstill, writes Sebastian Usher.

stories.title: Three Lebanese journalists killed in Israeli strike, say broadcasters
stories.description: The Israeli military confirms it killed Ali Shoeib from the Hezbollah-affiliated Al Manar TV.

stories.title: 'My daughter is under the rubble': Inside Tehran as civilian toll of strikes rises
stories.description: One month since the US and Israel launched strikes on Iran, Tehran residents tell the BBC their lives have been devastated.

stories.title: Palestinian man killed as death toll from West Bank settler violence climbs
stories.description: Mohammad al-Malhi is the seventh Palestinian killed by a settler in a surge of violence since the start of the war with Iran.

stories.title: UN human rights chief calls on US to conclude probe into Iran school strike
stories.description: The strike - which killed at least 168 people, mostly children - "evoked a visceral horror", Volker Türk said.

stories.title: Ukraine signs deal with Saudi Arabia offering drone expertise
stories.description: Volodymyr Zelensky says the Gulf kingdom faces the same type of attacks from Iran that Kyiv has been resisting.

stories.title: Gaza peace doubts deepen as attention shifts to Iran
stories.description: With the world focused on the Iran war, there is increasing uncertainty about what happens next for Gaza.

stories.title: Video shows US missile likely used in deadly strike on Iranian town, experts say
stories.description: The analysts identified a Precision Strike Missile (PrSM) in footage of the strike on the southern town of Lamerd.

stories.title: Is Trump's pause on attacking Iranian energy for diplomacy or an escalation?
stories.description: The US president's commitment to deadlines is fluid but he uses them for a purpose, writes the BBC's James Landale.

stories.title: How the Hormuz closure could affect food, medicines and smartphones
stories.description: The price of a wide range of goods - from food, to smartphones, to medicines - could be affected by the US-Israel war with Iran.

stories.title: Why did US and Israel attack Iran and how long could the war last?
stories.description: Conflict has spread across the Middle East since the US and Israel launched strikes on Iran on 28 February.

stories.title: A committed pharmacist and a homesick blogger – the Iranian civilians killed in the war
stories.description: The toll on civilians is mounting fast as the US-Israeli war on Iran continues.

stories.title: US' and Iran's options for ending war narrow the longer it goes on
stories.description: Iran shows no sign of climbdown, while air power alone cannot achieve the US' main goal.

stories.title: Why does the US have Iran's Kharg Island in its sights?
stories.description: The tiny island is home to one of the most critical pieces of Iran's energy infrastructure.

stories.title: Middle East war live: Trump says he could seize Iran's Kharg Island as US ramps up troop buildup
stories.description: US ⁠President ​Donald ​Trump said he wants ​to "take ‌the ⁠oil ‌in Iran" ⁠and could seize ​the ‌export hub of Kharg ​Island, in an interview with ​Financial ​Times ​published on ​Sunday as about 2,500 US Marines arrived in the region. Follow our liveblog for the latest developmen...

stories.title: Pakistan offers to host US-Iran talks as Tehran warns ground troops would be 'set on fire'
stories.description: Pakistan on Sunday said it would soon host talks between the United States and Iran over the monthlong war. Pakistan aims to position itself as a mediator as fighting intensifies across the region, global energy routes are shaken and fears grow of a broader conflict involving Isr...

stories.title: Zelensky visits Jordan on Middle East tour to bolster security ties
stories.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky said he was in Jordan on Sunday as part of a regional tour focused on security cooperation, after Kyiv deployed anti-drone experts and struck defence agreements with several Gulf states amid rising tensions linked to Iran.

stories.title: From the Iran war to the US petrol pumps
stories.description: 30 days into the war in Iran, the key Strait of Hormuz is still partially closed, making prices of oil rise, considerably affecting businesses and citizens all around the world. Business owner John Catsimatidis decrypts this situation with France 24's Gavin Lee.

stories.title: Massive protests against Trump across US
stories.description: Huge crowds protested Saturday against US President Donald Trump's actions and the war in Iran in "No Kings" rallies across the US and in Europe. Minnesota took centre stage, with thousands of people standing shoulder-to-shoulder to celebrate resistance to Trump's aggressive immi...

stories.title: Day of zero waste: International Chef Massimo Bottura speaks to France 24
stories.description: Monday marks the UN’s International Day of Zero Waste, an occasion aimed at raising awareness about sustainability, with this year’s spotlight on food. Each year, roughly one billion tonnes of edible food - nearly one-fifth of what is available to consumers - ends up being discar...

stories.title: Qatari news channel AI Araby condemns attack on its office
stories.description: Iran’s parliamentary speaker has cautioned the United States against launching a ground invasion, warning that Tehran could intensify attacks on US allies, according to state media. Meanwhile, an American-born Israeli soldier has been killed during fighting in southern Lebanon, o...

stories.title: Iran: 3.500 US troops arrive in the region
stories.description: Iran will target the USS Abraham Lincoln aircraft carrier "as soon as" it comes within range, the country's navy chief said Sunday. Iranian parliament speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf earlier accused Washington of plotting a ground attack on Iran even as it claims to be engaging ...

stories.title: Mediation talks in Islamabad: Middle East powers meet to discuss how to end the fighting
stories.description: The United States is plotting a ground attack on Iran even as it claims to be engaging in diplomatic efforts, Iranian parliament speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf said Sunday, as more American marines arrive in the region. The Israeli army earlier announced the death in combat of ...

stories.title: ‘We’re killing them, bro’: Israelis correct Iranian online streamer
stories.description: Iranian musician thanks young Israeli women for ‘saving’ Iran through US-Israeli air strikes.

stories.title: Trump says Iran’s ‘had regime change’ as he describes ‘boatloads of oil’
stories.description: US President Donald Trump says the US-Israeli war on Iran has effectively brought ‘regime change’.

stories.title: IAEA says Iran’s Khondab heavy water reactor no longer operational
stories.description: The UN’s nuclear watchdog says Iran’s Khondab heavy water production plant is no longer operational.

stories.title: Iranian academic describes US-Israeli attacks on Iran’s universities
stories.description: Doutaghi says the attack reflects a wider pattern and raises questions about what defines ‘legitimate retaliation'.

stories.title: Oil tops $116 a barrel as Iran accuses US of preparing invasion
stories.description: Crude prices continue to climb as world faces its biggest energy crisis in decades.

stories.title: Iranian attack damages Kuwait power and desalination plant, kills worker
stories.description: Kuwaiti authorities say Indian worker killed in attack that also caused 'significant material damage' to building.

stories.title: Iran war live: Trump says wants to take Iran’s oil; Kuwait power site hit
stories.description: Kuwait says an Indian worker has been killed in an Iranian raid as attacks across the Gulf continue.

stories.title: How will the Houthis’ involvement shape the war?
stories.description: The Yemeni group has launched missiles towards Israel in support of Iran.

stories.title: Iran accuses US of plotting ground attack, as Israel steps up bombardment
stories.description: Power being restored after Iran's Ministry of Energy reported outages in the capital, Tehran following attacks.

stories.title: IRGC spokesperson says Trump ‘only understands the language of force’
stories.description: IRGC spokesperson Ebrahim Zolfaghari dismisses threats of US ground operations.

stories.title: Qatari TV station hit in Iran
stories.description: Qatar’s Al Araby network condemns an attack on its office in Tehran, which injured at least 10 people.

stories.title: Cuba is not alone, deputy FM says as US threats grow
stories.description: Cuba's deputy foreign minister says island will resist US pressure as sanctions deepen, blackouts and tensions escalate.

stories.title: Dar hints at US, Iran talks as quad pushes peace off-ramp
stories.description: • Saudi Arabia, Turkiye and Egypt back efforts to create conditions for Washington-Tehran structured negotiations• FMs explore ways for permanent end to hostilities, insist war is ‘not in favour of anyone’• Deputy PM to leave for Beijing to meet Chinese foreign minister tomorrow ...

stories.title: Russian tanker nears Cuba, defying US oil blockade
stories.description: HAVANA: A Russian oil tanker under US sanctions is scheduled to arrive in Cuba on Monday, challenging a de facto American fuel blockade of the energy-starved island, shipping data shows. The Anatoly Kolodkin, which is carrying 730,000 barrels of crude, was north of Haiti on Sunda...

stories.title: Australia to halve fuel tax to keep prices within reach of citizens amid Iran war
stories.description: Australia will halve a fuel tax to help motorists experiencing soaring petrol prices due to war in the Middle East, Prime Minister Anthony Albanese said Monday. Albanese announced the step after meeting with the leaders of Australia’s states and territories on Monday, agreeing a ...

stories.title: Industry in crosshairs amid no let-up in Iran war
stories.description: BLACK smoke billows from a site in the Neot Hovav industrial zone near Be’er Sheva in Israel after Iranian missiles struck the facility.—X/@iribnews_irib • Tehran strikes aluminium producers in UAE and Bahrain, chemical plant in Israel; Neot Hovav industrial zone fire declared ‘h...

stories.title: Israel, US attack amusement park in central Iran
stories.description: No information on casualties or damage has been reported yet

stories.title: US president says he would like to take control of Iranian oil
stories.description: On March 26, Donald Trump also said at a Cabinet meeting that he considers taking control of Iranian oil to be one of the possible scenarios

stories.title: Trump says Iran ready to accept many US demands
stories.description: The US President stated that he "do see a deal in Iran"

stories.title: US could quickly shut down any move to charge fees in Strait of Hormuz — Trump
stories.description: Donald Trump said that Washington "could close that up in two minutes"

stories.title: Trump says Iran must comply with all US demands or face severe consequences
stories.description: The US leader stressed that Iran has to "give up nuclear weapons"

stories.title: Iran to let 20 oil tankers through Strait of Hormuz, Trump says
stories.description: Donald Trump told this to reporters aboard his plane on route from West Palm Beach, Florida, to Washington

stories.title: US holds both direct, indirect talks with Iran, Trump says
stories.description: The US leader added that "emissaries" are involved in the talks, but did not provide any details

stories.title: US, Israel discuss next steps against Iran’s military-industrial enterprises — CNN
stories.description: According to the TV channel’s sources, the meeting focused on the war against Iran and efforts to halt Iranian weapons production

stories.title: Strikes target Mehrabad Airport, branch of Iran’s Central Bank in Tehran — TV
stories.description: A cardboard factory in the south of the city and the Qasr-e Firouzeh residential complex also came under attack

stories.title: US-Israeli strike targets petrochemical facility in Iran’s Tabriz — CEO
stories.description: No release of toxic or hazardous substances has been detected

stories.title: Iran shows itself 'military adept' in conflict with US, Israel — expert
stories.description: American political scientist Garland Nixon opined that Iran has shown "to be quite good at military strategy"

stories.title: Iran to hit more targets if US attacks Kharg Island — ambassador
stories.description: Tehran’s Ambassador to Zimbabwe Amir Hossein Hosseini also expressed hope that the conflict would be resolved diplomatically

stories.title: US air forces expose F-35 jets to enemy fire by coming closer to Iran — analyst
stories.description: According to Scott Ritter, the US has been "very successful in blowing up points on the ground" but it has not degraded the Iranian defense industry, which was relocated and hidden

stories.title: About 21,000 Iranian civilians suffer injuries in US-Israeli strikes — Red Crescent
stories.description: The attacks have killed 214 children and 244 women, the Red Crescent stressed

stories.title: Iranian energy facilities come under attack — energy minister
stories.description: Meanwhile, the Fars news agency said that electricity supplies to Tehran and Karaj had been restored

stories.title: DPRK slams U.S. for orchestrating efforts to tighten financial sanctions against Pyongyang
stories.description: The Democratic People's Republic of Korea (DPRK) has slammed the United States for orchestrating efforts to tighten financial sanctions against Pyongyang.
